title: VP Project Manager (Payment)
description:
As Project Manager, you will hold accountability for the successful delivery large and complex IT projects, whether operating independently or within a program framework. Utilizing an agreed-upon project methodology, the focus includes robust risk and issues management, comprehensive documentation, and efficient project management within a stringent schedule.

Key Responsibility Areas:

  • Fully Responsible for defining, documenting, and successfully completing complex projects through the entire project lifecycles for Payment project.
  • Adopts and adapts project management methods and tools
  • Ensures effectiveness of project control, change control, risk management, and testing processes.
  • Monitors and controls resources, revenue, and capital costs against the project budget, managing expectations of all project stakeholders.
  • Performs what-if analyses and scenario planning, developing insights and proposals to improve business value.
  • Works with stakeholderss to agree and implement short-term and medium-term modifications to demand, maintaining a register of business requests and reporting as required.
  • Takes responsibility across all stages and iterations of software development, planning and driving software construction activities.
  • Defines systems development projects supporting the organization's objectives and plans, ensuring senior management is aware of and able to provide required resources.

Key Selection Criteria:

  • Bachelor Degree with min 12 years of experience in IT
  • Current project management accreditation PMP / PRINCE2 preferred and Agile in addition would be beneficial.
  • Demonstrated prior success in delivery of complex IT application project
  • Prior experience in managing projects in cash management or Payment (GIRO, SWIFT, FAST, etc) application
  • Extensive project lifecycle experience understanding the planning and delivery of projects in its entirety.
  • Excellent written and oral communication skills

Interested candidates please email your latest resume to subagio@tangspac.com

postedCompany.description:
Tangspac Consulting is an award-winning professional staffing firm with a 20-year footprint in Asia and headquarters in Singapore dating back to 1993. It offers bespoke contingency search and professional services across various Finance & Technology sectors. 

Our team of consultants has unparalleled expertise and track-record in serving both buy-side and sell-side firms, including the largest names on Wall Street. We have successfully placed thousands of banking professionals across various business & technology verticals. Clients range from Corporate & Investment Banks, Asset Managers, Custodians, Trusts, Private Banks, to other Publicly Traded Companies.
 

Tangspac is a founding member of The Association of Professional Staffing Companies (APSCo) Asia, which is a trade body originally established in the UK that maintains close relationships with key government departments and agencies on behalf of the professional staffing industry.
postedCompany.name: TANGSPAC CONSULTING PTE LTD
